working_tree: implementation diff was committed unchanged as git_revision after measurement
protocol: Seven Streaming cases; one warm-up followed by three measured runs per case. The measured run nearest elapsed_ms median is representative and is verified with openpyxl.
resource_metrics: Worksheet body pending-buffer high-water mark, flush count, and active worksheet temporary-file count after successful close
scope: Single Windows/MSVC machine, one 1,000,000-cell dataset family and DEFLATE level 6. No cross-machine or arbitrary-workload claim.
